title: Beef Pho (Community Enhanced)
ingredients: Bean sprouts, basil, lime for serving
instructions: Simmer bones with spices for 6 hours.
Assemble bowls with broth, noodles, meat.
Add a dash of hoisin sauce and squeeze of lime before eating.

source_review.text: Authentic taste! Added a splash of fish sauce and a pinch of sugar. Added a dash of hoisin sauce and squeeze of lime before eating.

modifications_applied.reasoning: Enhances the flavor profile of the dish with additional umami and acidity.

changes_made.to_text: Add a dash of hoisin sauce and squeeze of lime before eating.

source_review.text: Used chicken broth instead of beef. Added extra cinnamon and a pinch of star anise. Topped with sliced jalapenos.

modifications_applied.reasoning: User preferred the flavor of chicken broth over beef broth.

enhancement_summary.expected_impact: Enhances the flavor profile of the dish with additional umami and acidity.; User preferred the flavor of chicken broth over beef broth.
